markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review AI content performance and define the next content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Visibility Gap:** Talon.One has strong AI response visibility (top 3 in 70% of prompts) but a 0% citation share. This is because AI sources comparison articles, which Talon.One lacks.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The content strategy will pivot to prioritize comparison articles for the next 1–2 weeks to fix the citation gap. Agentic commerce content will follow.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Agentic Content Plan:** A 1–2 week sprint will optimize existing agentic commerce pages for CTR by adding FAQs, better internal links, and a more educational structure.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**Competitor Insight:** Yotpo's successful strategy of creating agentic commerce content for specific LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT) will be adopted by Talon.One.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

## Topics

### AI Visibility & Citation Gap

  - [**Problem:** High visibility (top 3 in 70% of prompts) but 0% citation share.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [**Cause:** AI models primarily cite comparison articles for recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [**Solution:** Prioritize creating comparison articles to increase citation share.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Tool:** GrowthX will provide Talon.One access to the "Check That" AI monitoring tool.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)

### Agentic Commerce Content Audit

  - [**Finding:** Low CTR on agentic commerce pages despite high impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Cause:** A low average position in search results and AI summarization.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Recommendations:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [**Page Structure:** Add FAQs and clear educational content (who, what, why).](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Use prominent, visual links (like on product pages) to boost user engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [**Content:** Expand and restructure for better snippet visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Competitor Insight (Yotpo):** Yotpo's success with LLM-specific content (e.g., "Inside ChatGPT's shopping experience") provides a model for Talon.One.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [**Decision:** Prioritize comparison articles for the next 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Pacing:** 4 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Fix the AI citation gap before focusing on agentic commerce.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Future Agentic Content:** Will adopt the LLM-specific angle inspired by Yotpo.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
      - [Prioritize comparison articles for the next 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Provide "Check That" access to Jen Katie (Head of Demand).](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [Answer Isabelle's question on how "Check That" handles LLM conversation history.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [**Isabelle (Talon.One):**](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Share agentic commerce page recommendations with the content team.](https://fathom.video/share/yLSmb_Wfw-Wsda4cTkwTyDjEQczZnGWN?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
